def solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration)
  min_time = Float::INFINITY
  land_len = landStartTime.length
  water_len = waterStartTime.length

  for i in 0...land_len
    for j in 0...water_len
      # Land first then water
      land_end = landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i]
      water_start = waterStartTime[j]
      water_end_land_first = [land_end, water_start].max + waterDuration[j]

      # Water first then land
      water_end = waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j]
      land_start = [water_end, landStartTime[i]].max
      land_end_water_first = land_start + landDuration[i]

      current_min = [water_end_land_first, land_end_water_first].min
      min_time = [min_time, current_min].min
    end
  end
  min_time
end
